display.title: Display & Sound
display.subtitle: Tune visuals and audio alerts to your preferences.
display.displaySubsectionSubtitle: Adjust how the window renders backgrounds and effects.
display.showRemainingLimitsSubtitle: Display what is left instead of what is used.
display.showFilePathSubtitle: Display the parent path next to file links in messages.
display.splitChatDiff: Split chat and diff center panes
display.splitChatDiffSubtitle: Show chat and diff side by side instead of swapping between them.
display.autoGenerateTitleSubtitle: Generate a short title from your first message (uses extra tokens).
display.chatSubsectionSubtitle: Control how much conversation history is retained per thread.
display.unlimitedHistorySubtitle: Keep full thread history in memory (may impact performance).
display.scrollbackHelp: Higher values keep more history but may increase memory usage. Use "Sync from server" on a thread to re-fetch older messages.
display.scrollbackRange: Range: {{min}}–{{max}}. Counts messages, tool calls, and other conversation items.
display.reduceTransparencySubtitle: Use solid surfaces instead of glass.
display.uiFontHelp: Applies to all UI text. Leave empty to use the default system font stack.
display.codeFontHelp: Applies to git diffs and other mono-spaced readouts.
display.codeFontSizeHelp: Adjusts code and diff text size.
display.notificationSoundsSubtitle: Play a sound when a long-running agent finishes while the window is unfocused.
display.systemNotificationsSubtitle: Show a system notification when a long-running agent finishes while the window is unfocused.
display.subagentNotificationsSubtitle: Include spawned sub-agent threads in system notifications.
